name: synthetic/stylus-cold-cache/short
description: Stylus dispatch + activation: every block calls a Stylus-prefixed contract (real WASM with 0xEF F0 00 discriminant); block 1 also calls ArbWasm.activateProgram. Measures discriminant detection, metadata lookup, ACTIVATION_UPFRONT_GAS charge, and WASM validation cost. Successful WASM execution requires a stylus-sdk-compiled artifact (see crates/arb-bench/src/capture/stylus_fixture.rs).
